## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
 - WSL Version: [e.g. 2.0.9.0]
 - Ubuntu Release: [e.g. 24.04.3 LTS]
 - Service Version: [e.g. OpenClaw v2026.2.26]

## Logs
```
Paste relevant service logs here
Use journalctl -u <service> -n 50
```

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
